description: The first time [gold]this creature[/gold] is hit each turn, it gains [blue][Amount][/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
description_raw: The first time [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] is hit each turn, it gains [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
name: Skittish

description: Whenever you apply a debuff to an enemy, they take [blue]13[/blue] damage.
name: Sleight of Flesh

description: The next [blue]2[/blue] times [gold]this creature[/gold] loses HP, it only loses [blue]1[/blue] HP instead.
description_raw: The next {Amount:plural:time|[blue]{}[/blue] times} [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] loses HP, it only loses [blue]1[/blue] HP instead.
name: Slippery

description: You cannot play more than [blue]3[/blue] cards each turn.
name: Sloth

description: Whenever you play a card, this enemy receives [blue]10%[/blue] more damage from Attacks this turn.
name: Slow

description: Awakens upon taking turns or losing HP 3 times.
name: Slumber

description: You can only play [blue]1[/blue] Skill per turn.
name: Smoggy

description: Whenever you create a Status, deal damage to ALL enemies.
name: Smokestack

description: Whenever another player attacks an enemy, gain [gold]Block[/gold].
name: Sneaky

description: Receives [blue]50%[/blue] less attack damage until it lands.
description_raw: Receives [blue]{DamageDecrease}%[/blue] less attack damage until it lands.
name: Soar

description: At the start of your turn, add [blue]1[/blue] random Colorless card into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
name: Spectrum Shift

description: Gain [gold]Dexterity[/gold] until the end of this turn.
name: Temporary Dexterity

description: Whenever you draw a card during your turn, deal [blue]1[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
name: Speedster

description: At the start of your turn, [gold]Channel[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Glass[/gold].
name: Spinner

description: Whenever you play an [gold]Ethereal[/gold] card, gain [blue]4[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
name: Spirit of Ash

description: At the end of your turn, [blue]1[/blue] random Attack in your [gold]Hand[/gold] is played against a random enemy.
name: Stampede

description: Gain 1 [star:1] next turn.
description_raw: Gain 1 {singleStarIcon} next turn.
name: Star Next Turn

description: When killed, deals damage at the end of your next turn.
name: Steam Eruption

description: When killed, a new Axebot is summoned in its place.
name: Stock

description: Whenever you play a Power, [gold]Channel[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Lightning[/gold].
name: Storm

description: Whenever you play a card this turn, this enemy loses [blue]2[/blue] HP.
name: Strangle

description: Whenever you shuffle your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], choose [blue]1[/blue] card from it to put into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
name: Stratagem

description: Strength adds additional damage to Attacks.
name: Strength

description: Whenever you play a Power, gain [blue]1[/blue] [energy:1].
description_raw: Whenever you play a Power, gain [blue]1[/blue] {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
name: Subroutine

description: Whenever [gold]this creature[/gold] deals unblocked attack damage, it gains [blue][Amount][/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
description_raw: Whenever [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] deals unblocked attack damage, it gains [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
name: Suck

description: At the start of your next turn, [gold]Summon[/gold] [blue]2[/blue].
name: Summon Next Turn

description: Something is off about this creature...
name: Surprise

description: Receive [blue]50%[/blue] more damage if attacked from behind. Use targeting cards or potions to change your orientation.
name: Surrounded

description: Upon killing this enemy, the stolen card is returned.
name: Swipe

description: Increase the cost of [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold] by [blue]1[/blue]. [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold] now hits [blue]1[/blue] additional time.
name: Sword Sage

description: Gain [gold]Focus[/gold] until the end of this turn.
name: Temporary Focus

description: The next Attack another player plays on the enemy is played an extra time.
name: Tag Team

description: Attacks cost [blue]1[/blue] additional [gold]Energy[/gold] this turn.
name: Tangled

description: Take double damage from enemies. Allies take half damage from enemies.
name: Tank

description: Whenever you play a card, lose [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] and [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold] this turn.
name: Tender

description: At the end of its turn, gains [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
name: Territorial

description: At the end of [blue]2[/blue] turns, deal [blue]40[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
description_raw: At the end of {Amount:plural:this turn|[blue]{}[/blue] turns}, deal [blue]{Damage}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
name: The Bomb

description: If you take unblocked attack damage this combat, die.
name: The Gambit

description: Gain [blue]1[/blue] additional card reward at the end of combat.
name: The Hunt

description: Whenever you play a card, gain [star:1].
description_raw: Whenever you play a card, gain {singleStarIcon}.
name: The Sealed Throne

description: Steals [gold]Gold[/gold] when Attacking.
name: Thievery

description: When hit by an attack, deal damage back.
name: Thorns

description: Whenever you [gold]Evoke Lightning[/gold], deal [blue]8[/blue] damage to each enemy hit.
name: Thunder

description: At the start of your turn, draw [blue]1[/blue] card and discard [blue]1[/blue] card.
name: Tools of the Trade

description: Gain [blue]0[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold] at the start of the next [blue][Amount][/blue] turns.
description_raw: Gain [blue]{Block:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold] at the start of the next [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:turn|turns}.
name: Toric Toughness

description: [gold]Weak[/gold] enemies take [blue]2[/blue] times more damage from Attacks.
name: Tracking

description: Whenever you create a Status, [gold]Channel[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] random Orb.
name: Trash to Treasure

description: At the start of your turn, draw a card and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card from your [gold]Hand[/gold].
name: Tyranny

description: The first time you gain [gold]Block[/gold] from a card each turn, double the amount gained.
name: Unmovable

description: The next [gold]Ethereal card[/gold] you play costs [blue]0[/blue].
name: Veilpiercer

description: Whenever you apply [gold]Vulnerable[/gold], draw [blue]1[/blue] card.
name: Vicious

description: [gold]this creature's[/gold] next Attack deals [blue][Amount][/blue] additional damage.
description_raw: {OnPlayer:Your|[gold]{OwnerName}'s[/gold]} next Attack deals [blue]{Amount}[/blue] additional damage.
name: Vigor

description: The first time [gold]this creature[/gold] takes Attack damage each turn, the attacker gains [energy:1].
description_raw: The first time [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] takes Attack damage each turn, the attacker gains {Energy:energyIcons()}.
name: Vital Spark

description: The first [blue]2[/blue] cards you play each turn are free to play.
name: Void Form

description: Vulnerable creatures take [blue]50%[/blue] more damage from Attacks.
name: Vulnerable

description: Gain [blue]1[/blue] less [gold]Energy[/gold] per turn.
name: Waste Away

description: Weakened creatures deal [blue]25%[/blue] less damage with Attacks.
name: Weak

description: At the end of your turn, [gold]Retain[/gold] up to [blue]1[/blue] card.
name: Well-Laid Plans

description: At the start of your turn, lose [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
name: Wraith Form
